@href.description: The location of the referenced object

display_name.description: The display name of the object

original_instance_id.description: ID for the original instance of this object, if this connection is based on a published interface

cloned.description: Indicates whether it is a cloned Object

protocol.description: The protocol number, for IP service: protocol is not specified.

min.description: For IP, TCP and UDP Services: the minimum port number, ICMP Service: the ICMP type number.

max.description: For IP, TCP and UDP Services: the maximum port number.

timeout.description: The timeout value for the service in seconds

member.description: List of references to the service group members

cloned.description: Indicates whether it is a cloned Object

name.description: The name of the referenced object

type.description: The type of the referenced object

management_domain.description: The management domain from which the referenced object comes from

uid.description: The unique identifier of the referenced object

link.description: The data structure that contains the href tag, which sets the location of the referenced object in the SecureApp database

member.description: List of references to a DM_INLINE group members
